lines: Sister Joanna boils water with a knife laid across the basin.
"Clean cloth is for wounds. Dirty cloth is for officers who ask why clean cloth is gone."

choices.label: Give her the road casualty sequence

effects.log: Joanna records the road wounds in their true order and gives you one safe dressing.
Joanna records Deborah's untreated crush and gives you one safe dressing.

lines: Joanna turns the boil ledger so the reject column faces you.
"If cloth left this tent, tell me which fold it wore. I count clean stock by what the kettle failed to ruin."

choices.label: Show her the refolded dressing packet

effects.log: Joanna removes the refolded packet from use and marks the boil ledger.

choices.label: Tell her the glass stain still answers

effects.log: Joanna marks the responding stain for Melchior's sealed shelf.

choices.label: Tell her which packet stayed clean

effects.log: Joanna amends the clean dressing count.

lines: Joanna takes the empty wrapper by the wax edge.
"Dry at the center, and the seal never softened. You saved one dressing from my reject basin, so I will amend the count."
Joanna opens the packet at one corner and finds the old fold under the steam crease.
"Somebody boiled guilt and called it gauze. Put that packet in the red basin. I will ask the supply tent who taught linen to lie."

choices.label: Leave her to the boil ledger

lines: Joanna steadies the glass with the blunt side of her knife.
"It drew away from heat yesterday. Bell motion is new. Melchior gets the sample, the shelf, and my written refusal to carry either."
Joanna writes the first wound before she asks where the bodies lay.
"Good. Teeth came later. That keeps the wolves out of the death count and puts the knife back in a human hand. Aquila dislikes that sort of accuracy."
Joanna draws a wheel-width band across the foot on her slate.
"Hours before the peals, then. That puts Carbo on the road before closure and the swelling under my knife tonight. Kettle spirit is not treatment, whatever the kettle claims."
